overview: Vitality Urology Institute is a boutique urology practice in Houston specializing in men's sexual health and urologic conditions. The clinic offers both surgical and non-surgical treatments for erectile dysfunction, Peyronie's disease, benign prostate enlargement, and related issues.
highlights: High-volume penile implant specialist (performs more annual procedures than any other surgeon in Texas)
In-office Rezum treatment for benign prostate enlargement with quick recovery
Multiple treatment options for Peyronie's disease including surgery, Xiaflex injections, and shockwave therapy
targetAudience: Men with erectile dysfunction, Peyronie's disease, prostate enlargement, and other urologic sexual health concerns.
